---
slug: anchor-equals-keyphrase
keyphrase: local delivery service
---

# Local delivery service overview

When we offer a [local delivery service](https://example.com/services/local-delivery/),
we want the anchor text to NOT exactly equal the keyphrase, otherwise
the link competes with the article itself for the same query.

The QA module flags this as competing-anchor.

## Why this matters

Internal linking guidance: vary anchor wording.

Local delivery service is the topic. We talk about local delivery
service in detail. Local delivery service prices vary by city.
